title: docs: update README — 2026-05-20
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our automated bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and recent apps sections.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository landing page current with the latest community creations and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the robot companion organizing a bulletin board or painting a sign. Since it's a daily automated task, maybe the robot is doing it while Polly watches or helps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head updating a wooden bulletin board covered in pixelated notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
